tasks.title: Apply database file: Supabase PostgreSQL Schema
tasks.plainEnglish: A one-time database setup file. Paste its contents into the Supabase SQL editor and run it so the matching feature has its tables. It is safe to run again — these files are written to be additive. (File: server/supabase_schema.sql)
steps: Open your Supabase project → SQL Editor → New query.
Open the file server/supabase_schema.sql in your code editor and copy everything.
Paste it into the Supabase SQL editor and click Run.
When it finishes without errors, mark this task done below.
